_comment: Minimal public-distribution config. The 'profile' block synthesizes the canonical 3-tunnel topology (video rx link 207, boundary-probe rx link 50, uplink tx link 208 with WCMD control on :8000) plus the adapter bring-up/down commands — link ids and ports match the vehicle's S99wfb and are not configurable here by design. For non-standard topologies, replace 'profile' with an explicit 'tunnels' array (see host_x86.json); the two forms are mutually exclusive.

profile._comment: ifaces = all monitor-mode adapters (RX diversity); uplink_iface (default: last entry) also carries the GS->vehicle TX. txpower_mbm is optional (100 mBm = 1 dBm; omit to leave adapter defaults). wfb_bin_dir is optional (omit to resolve wfb_rx/wfb_tx from $PATH).

_comment_system: Optional: an explicit 'system' block composes with the profile — its 'up' entries run after the synthesized adapter bring-up, its 'down' entries before the synthesized take-down.
